description_long: This object is a sleek, metallic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply pointed nose, designed for high-speed flight. The wings are mid-mounted and sharply swept back, giving it a modern, aerodynamic profile. The surface is predominantly silver-gray with a few visible panel lines and a dark, tinted cockpit canopy near the front. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and a conventional horizontal stabilizer arrangement. The engine intake is located at the rear of the fuselage, suggesting a single rear-mounted jet engine. There are no visible external landing gear or armaments, emphasizing a clean, high-performance design.
description: A sleek, silver-gray airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a pointed nose, and a rear jet engine, featuring a dark cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, mid-mounted swept wings, and the narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, and the forward-placed cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single engine exhaust, vertical stabilizer, and the symmetrical wing layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the cockpit and wing sweep.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
